title: Good night sweetie
description: A simple mod that adds a little more real, immersive animation when sleeping/waking up
body:
Okay so you know how when you go to sleep/wake up you don't **instantly** close/open your eyes but rather slowly and multiple times?  
Well, that's basically what this simple mod does!
Adds a little bit of realism and a small effect that no one asked but everyone is happy to have!  

Oh and also it requires Fabric API.

Enjoy :)
